description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On May 29, 2025 at 11:31 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a pickup truck on 4th Street at Freelon Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeastbound on 4th Street and stopped in a queue of traffic. While the Waymo remained stopped for 
traffic ahead, a pickup truck traveling directly behind the Waymo AV approached the Waymo AV and the front driver side of the pick up 
truck made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
